evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)

blocking_issues.summary: Unknown material facts are masked by the Z2 gate for temporary/conditional signals.
details: current_contract criterion 3 requires any unknown material condition to yield UNKNOWN and never Z0.

engine.py evaluates the Z2 temporary/conditional gate before the UNKNOWN gate. As a result, trial/new_customer_credit/bounded availability/manual_upgrade_required can return Z2 even when requires_card/has_paid_dependencies/quota data are unknown.

Independent adversarial failures: trial_with_unknown_card -> Z2, trial_with_no_quota_data -> Z2, bounded_until_with_unknown_paid_deps -> Z2, manual_upgrade_with_unknown_card -> Z2; all expected UNKNOWN under the contract and evaluator prompt.
blocking_issues.evidence_command: inline Python adversarial classifier/ORM probe with PYTHONPATH=apps/api exited 1 and printed 4 safety failures.

criteria.name: pure_deterministic_offline_function
criteria.acceptance_criterion: classify() is a pure deterministic function (no I/O, no network, no LLM) importable offline; identical inputs always yield an identical ClassificationResult.
evidence: Read apps/api/app/classify/engine.py: classify(facts, *, as_of=None) only consumes OfferFacts/date and returns a frozen ClassificationResult; no file/network/LLM/database imports or I/O calls.
Independent adversarial check determinism_equal_results PASS: two calls on identical OfferFacts/as_of returned equal ClassificationResult objects.
Result and input immutability checks PASS: assigning to ClassificationResult.zero_cost_class and OfferFacts.requires_card raised FrozenInstanceError.

criteria.name: billing_gates_z1
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Billing gates: requires_card True, has_paid_dependencies True, or any automatic_billing quota is classified Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE and NEVER Z0, with the specific gate named in blocking_conditions.
evidence: Read engine.py gate 2: requires_card True, has_paid_dependencies True, or BILLING_EXHAUSTION automatic_billing returns Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE with billing reasons copied to blocking_conditions.
Independent adversarial checks PASS: requires_card_dominates_z0 -> Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE; automatic_billing_quota_is_z1 -> Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE.

tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py includes Z1 cases for card, paid dependencies, automatic_billing, contradictory always_free+card, and known Z1 exposure with other unknown fields; targeted pytest reported 71 passed.

criteria.name: unknown_material_conditions_unknown
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Safety rule: any material condition that is unknown (requires_card None, has_paid_dependencies None, exhaustion_behaviour unknown, or total absence of quota data) yields UNKNOWN and NEVER Z0.
evidence: Basic independent safety checks PASS for always_free inputs: requires_card=None -> UNKNOWN; has_paid_dependencies=None -> UNKNOWN; exhaustion_behaviour unknown -> UNKNOWN; unrecognised exhaustion -> UNKNOWN; no quota data -> UNKNOWN.

Blocking adversarial checks FAIL when a Z2 signal is present because engine.py gate 3 runs before gate 4: trial_with_unknown_card returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL, expected UNKNOWN; trial_with_no_quota_data returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL, expected UNKNOWN; bounded_until_with_unknown_paid_deps returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL, expected UNKNOWN; manual_upgrade_with_unknown_card returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL, expected UNKNOWN.
This violates current_contract criterion 3 and the evaluator prompt requirement that unknown material conditions must be UNKNOWN, not merely non-Z0.

criteria.name: z0_rule_clear_gates_safe_exhaustion
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Z0_TRUE_FREE is returned only when all billing gates are explicitly clear and every quota exhaustion behaviour is a safe stop-type; blocking_conditions is empty and reasons explain why it is $0.
evidence: Read engine.py gate 5: Z0 is reached only after billing, conditional, and unknown gates do not return; reasons include no card, no paid dependencies, safe stop behaviours, and classified Z0_TRUE_FREE.
Independent adversarial check clean_true_free PASS: always_free, requires_card=False, has_paid_dependencies=False, hard_stop/read_only -> Z0_TRUE_FREE with empty blocking_conditions.
Parameterized builder truth-table tests cover all nine SAFE_EXHAUSTION values across always_free, recurring_quota, personal_use_free, and other; targeted pytest reported 71 passed.

criteria.name: z2_rule_temporary_conditional
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Trial, new_customer_credit, bounded/expired availability windows, and eligibility-conditional program offer types are classified Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL (assuming no dominating billing exposure).
evidence: Read engine.py gate 3: TEMPORARY_CONDITIONAL_OFFER_TYPES, any available_until, and manual_upgrade_required quotas return Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL with blocking conditions.
Independent adversarial checks PASS: trial_is_z2, credit_is_z2, bounded_available_until_is_z2 all returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL when billing gates and unknown facts were clear.
tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py also covers startup/student/open-source/hackathon offer types, expired availability, and manual_upgrade_required; targeted pytest reported 71 passed.

criteria.name: z3_rule_self_hosted
evidence: Read engine.py gate 1: self_hosted_open_source returns Z3_SELF_HOSTED_BUILDING_BLOCK before billing/Z2/UNKNOWN gates.
Independent adversarial check self_hosted_is_z3 PASS: self_hosted_open_source with otherwise billing-like quota facts still returned Z3_SELF_HOSTED_BUILDING_BLOCK, matching the documented precedence.

criteria.name: explainable_result_contract
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Every ClassificationResult includes an ordered, human-readable reasons list; every non-Z0 result names at least one blocking or downgrading condition.
evidence: Read engine.py: each return path supplies tuple reasons; non-Z0 Z3/Z1/Z2/UNKNOWN paths also supply blocking_conditions from the deciding reasons.
Unit truth-table assertions check non-empty reasons/blocking conditions for representative Z0, Z1, Z2, Z3, and UNKNOWN paths; targeted pytest reported 71 passed.
Independent adversarial checks confirmed Z1/Z2/Z3/UNKNOWN non-Z0 results have class-specific blocking conditions during manual review of printed result paths.

criteria.name: orm_adapter_read_only_latest_version
criteria.acceptance_criterion: classify_offer(orm_offer) reads an Offer plus its Quota rows and returns the same result the pure function would for those facts, performing no writes.
evidence: Read apps/api/app/classify/orm.py: _select_version chooses max(offer.versions, key=version_number); offer_facts_from_orm reads offer booleans/dates and selected.quotas exhaustion_behaviour; classify_offer delegates to classify. No add/flush/commit/delete/execute calls exist.

Independent transient ORM probe PASS: Offer/OfferVersion/Quota instances were never session-attached; classify_offer selected v2 (version_number=2) and returned Z0; explicit v1 returned Z1 for automatic_billing; offer_facts_from_orm returned latest quota tuple (hard_stop); SQLAlchemy inspect(offer).session remained None after classification.

criteria.name: truth_table_suite_comprehensive
criteria.acceptance_criterion: A comprehensive truth-table unit suite covers each gate, each exhaustion behaviour, missing/contradictory/boundary data, and the no-Z0-on-unknown rule, and all tests pass offline.
evidence: Targeted command `.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\unit\test_z0_classifier.py -q` passed: 71 passed in 0.83s.

The suite includes vocabulary-drift guards: known_zero_cost_classes() == ZERO_COST_CLASSES, partition tiling of EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS, and referenced offer types in OFFER_TYPES. Engine imports OFFER_TYPES and EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS from app.models.vocab; zero-cost labels are local constants guarded by the test equality check.

However, independent adversarial checks exposed missing coverage for unknown material conditions combined with Z2 signals (trial, bounded availability, manual_upgrade_required). Because those combinations fail the contract safety rule, the truth-table suite is not sufficiently comprehensive for this acceptance criterion.

criteria.name: regression_green_live_stack_dependency_hygiene
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Regression green: scripts/test.ps1, scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit including requirements-sync/no new dependency, and full live stack cycle stack-up -> stack-smoke -> stack-down pass.
evidence: scripts/test.ps1 exited 0: pytest collected 153 items, 143 passed and 10 skipped in 4.61s; 4 config examples valid; Vitest 4 tests passed; Vite build succeeded; TESTS PASSED.

scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit exited 0: Ruff lint PASS; Ruff format check PASS (37 files); Pytest 143 passed/10 skipped in 1.86s; Prettier PASS; ESLint PASS; Secret scan PASS; pip-audit PASS (No known vulnerabilities found); npm audit PASS (0 vulnerabilities); ALL CHECKS PASSED.

Live stack cycle exited 0: stack-up built/started services and API was live; stack-smoke passed all 12 checks and ended STACK SMOKE PASSED; stack-down exited 0 with STACK DOWN; `docker compose ps --services --filter status=running` produced no running services.

Dependency manifest diff vs origin/main for pyproject.toml, apps/api/requirements.txt, apps/worker/requirements.txt, apps/web/package.json, apps/web/package-lock.json, package.json, package-lock.json, and requirements-dev.txt was empty.

criteria.name: product_truth_no_unsupported_claims
criteria.acceptance_criterion: No unsupported free-tier/zero-cost/Z0 product claim is introduced; the engine only classifies supplied facts and defaults to UNKNOWN rather than guessing; no real-service free claim is added.
evidence: Changed files in slice: agent-state/current_contract.json, agent-state/progress.md, apps/api/app/classify/{__init__,engine,orm}.py, docs/DATA_MODEL.md, tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py.

Product-truth added-line scan found Z0/free/$0 terminology only in engine/docs/tests/contracts and no real named-provider/service assertion. Provider-name added-line scan for AWS/Azure/Google/Oracle/Cloudflare/Vercel/GitHub returned PROVIDER_NAME_MATCH_COUNT=0.
No offer data, provider fixture, or catalogue record asserting a real service is free/Z0 was added.

known_issues_or_risks: The implementation matches the documented five-gate order, but the current_contract/evaluator prompt requires UNKNOWN whenever material data is unknown. Z2-before-UNKNOWN currently masks unknown card/dependency/quota facts for temporary/conditional offers.
Engine imports OFFER_TYPES and EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS from app.models.vocab; zero-cost class labels are local constants guarded by tests against ZERO_COST_CLASSES rather than imported directly.
F003 remains passes:false; full-epic close-out still requires separate Level 2 evaluation after slice corrections.
recommendation: Reject F003 slice 3 until UNKNOWN material conditions dominate or otherwise explicitly satisfy current_contract criterion 3, and add truth-table tests for unknown+Z2 combinations. Keep F003 passes:false.
